ADventure Success of our Advertising Students

Students of our Department of Advertising returned with degrees from the ADventure Advertising Competition organized by Boğaziçi University.

Group Mono, consisting of Billur Ahi, Artun Er and Ata Öner, took first place. Group Komple, the team of Nura Şahin, Birol Şahin and Nazlıhan Abdikoğlu, and Tolga Demirci (Tolgadv) shared third place with equal points.

ADventure Advertising Competition aims to enable university students who are interested in the sector and want to take part in this field in the future to experience the field of advertising. The event, which entered its 20th year this year, discovered young minds that will enter the industry with a jury consisting of leading names of the industry with the motto “Make a difference in the industry, create awareness in the society!” in cooperation with Unstereotype Alliance Turkey. The jury evaluated the works of the contestants based on criteria such as performance, creativity and fiction.
